<!-- Thanks for contributing to Ovo! Please fill in the sections below — it speeds up review a lot. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Why is this change needed?

<!-- Link the issue or Discussion this addresses. -->
<!-- e.g. Closes #123 / Resolves #456 / Related to discussion #789 -->

## Which axis of the philosophy does it serve?

<!-- See docs/PRODUCT_PHILOSOPHY.md — pick all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🚀 Proactive (helps Ovo act before being asked)
- [ ] 🪟 Transparent (makes Ovo's thinking more visible)
- [ ] 🎓 Teachable (lets users shape Ovo's behavior)
- [ ] 🔒 Privacy / local-first
- [ ] 🛠 Infrastructure / refactor / docs (no philosophy axis)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Tick what applies, and describe any manual testing -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:agents` passes
- [ ] Tested locally with `pnpm dev`
- [ ] Tested production build with `pnpm pack:mac`

## Screenshots / Recordings (for UI changes)

<!-- Drag images or GIFs here. Before / after side-by-side is great. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (`pnpm lint` clean)
- [ ] I have added tests where appropriate
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, tricky parts, follow-ups planned, etc. -->
